questions.prompt: Before the Printix Power BI report can show data for a customer, which step is required?
choices: Enable Analytics on the Settings, Analytics tab
Disable Microsoft Entra group sync to free the channel
Upgrade the Printix subscription to Enterprise
Restart the Printix Client on every workstation
questions.explanation: Analytics has to be enabled on the Settings tab so the data extract is available. Without it, the Power BI template has nothing to query.

questions.prompt: The Printix Power BI report's cost figures are a configurable estimate based on per-page costs the administrator enters, not a finance-grade ledger.
questions.explanation: The administrator enters Cost Per Mono Sheet, Cost Per Color Sheet, Cost Per Sheet etc. once during setup. The report multiplies pages by those costs. Useful for chargeback and trend-watching, not for finance reporting.
